title: UGC Actor Identity Card
description: The single source of truth for a synthetic UGC influencer. Every shot prompt's character-lock layer is built verbatim from these fields. Precision here is what keeps the person consistent across generations.

actor_id.description: Stable lowercase id, e.g. 'lila_v1'. Used as the filename and to reference the actor in briefs.

name.description: Display name used in briefs, e.g. 'Lila'.

origin.description: Ethnic/regional read that anchors features, e.g. 'Swedish', 'Brazilian', 'Korean'. Models default ambiguous faces toward a generic average; naming the origin prevents that.

age_range.description: Tight range, e.g. '21-23'. Keep it narrow; wide ranges drift.

face.description: Face shape + standout features, e.g. 'soft oval, high cheekbones, small straight nose, gentle rounded chin'.

eyes.description: Color + shape + a deliberate asymmetry, e.g. 'pale blue-grey, slightly hooded, left eye 2% smaller'. The asymmetry is intentional; it reads as a real individual.

skin_tone_hex.description: EXACT hex value, e.g. '#F8C4AE'. Never a phrase like 'fair skin'; a phrase is re-interpretable and drifts, a hex compiles to the same skin every time.

skin_notes.description: Undertone + texture details, e.g. 'fair, rosy undertone, faint freckling across nose bridge'.

hair.description: Color + texture + length + part, e.g. 'golden blonde, natural wave, mid-chest length, center part'.

jawline.description: Shape + a deliberate asymmetry, e.g. 'delicate, soft, slightly asymmetric, left side a touch softer'.

distinguishing_marks.description: Moles/scars/freckles pinned to specific locations, e.g. 'small mole below right jaw, faint scar left eyebrow, freckle on left collarbone'. These are identity anchors; the model will try to remove them; keep them.

outfit_variations.description: A small wardrobe the actor cycles through, e.g. ['oversized cream knit', 'linen slip dress', 'athleisure set'].

prompt_seed.description: A fixed integer seed to anchor generation across shots where the model supports seeds.

voice_notes.description: Optional. Voice direction for the audio layer, e.g. 'soft, warm, slight Scandinavian lilt, unhurried'.

negative_defaults.description: Optional. Per-actor additions to the standard negative prompt, e.g. ['no heavy makeup', 'no tattoos'].
